# Origin Dev Labs

> Business automation, AI agents, and custom software. Fixed-fee pricing, you own the code.

## Services
- Workflow Automation (from $1,500)
- Intelligent Agents / AI Chatbots (from $2,500)
- Smart Assistants (from $1,500/mo)
- Business Intelligence Dashboards (from $10,000)
- Web Development (from $5,000)
- UI/UX Design (audits from $3,000)
- Digital Products / SaaS / Apps (MVP from $50,000)
- Custom Software (from $20,000)

## FAQ
- Workflow automation costs $1,500-$15,000 (projects) or $500-$5,000/month (retainers)
- Custom websites cost $5,000-$25,000 (business) or $15,000-$75,000+ (e-commerce)
- AI chatbots cost $2,500-$150,000+ depending on complexity (FAQ bot to agentic AI)
- Custom software costs $20,000-$1,000,000+ depending on scope
- Clients own 100% of source code and IP — no vendor lock-in
- Websites built in 6-12 weeks, automation in 2-8 weeks
- Smart assistants from $1,500/month (vs $40,000-$60,000/year for a full-time hire)

## Contact
- Email: hello@origindevlabs.com
- Web: https://origindevlabs.com
- FAQ: https://origindevlabs.com/faq

## Key Facts
- Fixed-fee pricing, no long-term contracts
- 100% source code and IP ownership
- Agile sprints with weekly check-ins
- SOC2-compliant security processes
- Websites built in 6-12 weeks, automation in 2-8 weeks
